## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in bisque.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution.
- [ ] I have accepted the CLA as described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`, or this
      contribution is exempt.
- [ ] Public API changes update `src/lib.rs`, domain root docs,
      `docs/src/api-surface.md`, and `tests/api.rs`.
- [ ] Tests or docs are updated where behavior changes.
